step2.customerArchetype: Founders launching the second iteration of their company who need a brand that looks like it has been around longer than it has
step2.painPoints: First-pass brand was DIY; now real customers and partners are noticing the gap
step2.desiredOutcomes: A coherent visual and verbal system across site, social, and search profile

step4.missionStatement: Make small studios read as professional as their work already is.

step5.originSummary: Started as in-house brand leads; opened the studio to do the same work without internal politics.
step5.motivation: Wanted to do the work for founders who deserved a real brand on the first hire.

step7.differentiation: Senior team on every project; deliverables built for a real launch, not for the deck.
